green_path_mismatch.text: The worn path you have used across the green seems to meet the road a little farther north than you remember. Looking away and back does not help.
green_path_mismatch.summary: A familiar path across the green appeared subtly misaligned.

bakery_rhythm_break.text: The bakery falls silent at the exact moment you expect the oven door to open. A few seconds later the ordinary sounds resume, out of sequence.
bakery_rhythm_break.summary: The familiar bakery rhythm briefly occurred in the wrong order.

cottage_room_sound.text: From the room you have begun using most, you hear the small settling creak that normally comes from the empty room upstairs.
cottage_room_sound.summary: A familiar cottage sound came from the wrong part of the house.

halt_timetable_gap.text: You know the sparse timetable well enough now to be certain: for several seconds, one printed service is absent. When you check again, it is there.
halt_timetable_gap.summary: A familiar railway service briefly vanished from the timetable.

churchyard_name_shift.text: A surname you have seen often enough to recognise looks unfamiliar on the stone. The letters themselves are unchanged.
churchyard_name_shift.summary: A familiar churchyard name briefly felt unrecognisable.

unseasonal_hawthorn.text: Among the season's ordinary growth, one hawthorn branch is flowering as if it belongs to another month. The insects avoid it.
unseasonal_hawthorn.summary: A single plant flowered out of season while nearby wildlife avoided it.

shop_labels_repeat.text: Three different shelves carry the same handwritten price label in the same hand, including the same small spelling mistake. When you look again, only one does.
shop_labels_repeat.summary: Shop labels briefly repeated an identical handwritten error across unrelated shelves.
